# Gandhi

*1869 – 1948 · Indian*

Leader of Indian independence and theorist of nonviolence: satyagraha, the force of truth, turns civil disobedience and the refusal to harm into a political weapon able to disarm the oppressor without humiliating him.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
